action.reasoning: Observation: Iter10 trained NME with only ~1 epoch/task (84 sec total) and achieved val NME accuracy 0.2598, far below previous linear classifier's 0.4655 test accuracy. Analysis: The pipeline works, but insufficient training (likely 1 epoch/task) caused low accuracy. Need longer training (30 epochs/task) with same replay (200 exemplars/class) and proper logging. The NME method should eventually outperform linear classifier. Decision: Rewrite train.py with configurable epochs, robust label mapping, distillation, herding, and metric logging. Run 30 epochs/task, then submit eval with best checkpoint.
